title: Agent writing a git hook asks (execution-on-commit vector)
description: An AI agent writes .git/hooks/pre-commit — a planted hook runs on the next commit. The git_hook_tamper label fires ask-git-hook-tamper. file_write IS in the developer-workflow floor set, but the floor only suppresses ADVISORY escalation of a base allow; it cannot lower a native ask, so the rule stands. Final: ask. This is the v2-kernel mirror of the production posture floor (pkg/lease PostureFiles → mister-core ask); see TestIsPostureFile / TestLocalEvaluate_GitHookWrite_Asks for the production proof. ASK (not deny) so a human or hook framework can approve once.
